nasb.text: Since you are precious in My sight, Since you are honored and I love you, I will give other men in your place and other peoples in exchange for your life.

esv.text: Because you are precious in my eyes, and honored, and I love you, I give men in return for you, peoples in exchange for your life.

cnv.text: 因為你在我眼中非常寶貴和貴重， 所以我愛你； 我使別人作你的替身，同別的民族交換你的性命。

ccb.text: 我珍视你，看重你，深爱你， 所以我用他人代替你， 用列邦交换你的生命。

csbs.text: 因为你在我眼中看为宝贵、视为尊贵， 更因为我爱你， 所以我牺牲别人替代你， 牺牲万族替代你的性命。
